Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

test.name: Scenario: Create a new booking and verify the details

Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: When the user creates a booking with the following details
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking path_url=/booking headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '182', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"firstname": "John", "lastname": "Wick", "totalprice": 500, "depositpaid": true, "bookingdates": {"checkin": "2026-05-01", "checkout": "2026-05-10"}, "additionalneeds": "Breakfast"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Then the response status code should be 200
kw.source_name: the response status code should be ${status_code}

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: And the created booking should have the firstname "John"
kw.source_name: the created booking should have the firstname "${expected_name}"

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/2661 path_url=/booking/2661 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: And the API responds with a status code "200"
kw.source_name: the API responds with a status code "${expected_code}"

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.name: Scenario: Get all bookings and verify the list

kw.name: When the user requests all bookings
GET On Session

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Then the response status code should be 200
kw.source_name: the response status code should be ${status_code}

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: And the booking list should not be empty
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Get all bookings and verify the list is not empty

test.name: Scenario: Update an existing booking and verify the details

kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth path_url=/auth headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "admin", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/2665 path_url=/booking/2665 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'token=e3f8a0d53bb4dc4', 'Content-Length': '183', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"firstname": "Fuat", "lastname": "Kara", "totalprice": 999, "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": {"checkin": "2027-01-01", "checkout": "2027-01-10"}, "additionalneeds": "Breakfast"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Then the response status code should be 200
kw.source_name: the response status code should be ${status_code}

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: And the updated booking should have the firstname "Fuat"
kw.source_name: the updated booking should have the firstname "${expected_name}"

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/2665 path_url=/booking/2665 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
